t.t-value: invoice_lines.filtered(lambda l: not l.is_downpayment and not l.display_type=='line_section')
any((l.discount or 0.0) for l in regular_lines)

td.span: Al-Majd Square, King Faisal Street (West), Al Jubail
ساحة المجد شارع الملك فيصل (غربي) الجبيل
Al-Majd, King Faisal Street (West), Al Jubail

t.t-value: qty_str.rstrip('0').rstrip('.') if '.' in qty_str else qty_str

div.style: width:100%;border:0 none transparent !important;border-top:0 none transparent !important;border-right:0 none transparent !important;border-bottom:0 none transparent !important;border-left:0 none transparent !important;outline:0 !important;box-shadow:none !important;margin-top:10px;text-align:center;page-break-before:avoid !important;page-break-after:avoid !important;page-break-inside:avoid !important;
